7908 Turner Dr, North Richland Hills, TX 76182, USA

Exterior of fence, grass is mowed, bush is not weeded. Fruit is somewhat sweet and not too tart, best for jam, jelly, preserves, or baked goods where sugar is added. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: May-September.
